description: New WithBrowserLogs() API attaches a tracked browser resource to any endpoint-capable resource. Aspire launches a Chromium-based browser and streams console logs, network requests, and errors into the resource log stream. A dashboard command lets developers configure scope, browser, user data mode, and profile at runtime, with optional persistence to AppHost user secrets. A capture-screenshot resource command saves screenshot PNGs as durable local artifacts.
name: Browser log, network capture, and screenshot with WithBrowserLogs()
